@startuml actor User participant "Andorid APP" as AndroidAPP #D3D3D3 database Server == 主动更新 == User ->>AndroidAPP :进入设置页\n点击“ 更新地图数据 ”\n activate AndroidAPP note right of AndroidAPP:请求POI数据 \nGET /poi.json Server <- -AndroidAPP :返回数据 alt [Server版本号 >本地版本号] note left of AndroidAPP:比较Server版本号和
本地版本号 else endif deactivate AndroidAPP ==被动更新== autonumber "[0]" group Passive Update { activate AndroidAPP loop Check Last Updated Time & Compare With Current Date/Time Periodically Every Week Or More Than One Month Etc., If Needed Then Perform Automatic Updates Automatically Without Any Manual Intervention From Users Side At All Times During Its Operation Lifecycle As Long It Remains Active On Device Memory Storage Space Available For Running Processes Only Not Including Background Services Like Sync Adapters etc...} end group deactivate androidapp return null; } else do nothing here since we don't need any further actions after checking last updated time against current date/time periodical basis whether once per week/monthly/yearly depending upon business requirements specified by client side application developers who designed this system architecture pattern based solution approach using object oriented programming principles such encapsulation inheritance polymorphism abstraction composition aggregation association dependency injection inversion control principle single responsibility separation concerns SOLID design patterns MVC MVP MVVM VIPER Clean Architecture
